title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Derby. Yaeno Muteki
exchanges greetings with Mejiro Ardan and
Sakura Chiyono O before the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one has much to say. There is so much tension
in the air that it becomes hard to breathe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has watched her friends obsess
over the Derby. She knows how much they want
this win. But rather than be deterred, it has
strengthened her own resolve to win.
